description: Benchmark tests for requirements-sync skill - syncs User Story status to UPM requirements and detects drift

evals.name: status-sync
evals.prompt: 同步状态: US-005 状态已更新为 Done，将此状态同步到 UPM requirements 章节对应条目

assertions.name: updates_upm_status
assertions.description: Should update UPM requirements entry status to Done

assertions.name: identifies_changed_entry
assertions.description: Should identify the specific UPM entry that was changed

assertions.name: records_previous_status
assertions.description: Should record the previous status (In Progress) for audit trail

evals.name: drift-detection
evals.prompt: 检测漂移: US-012 在 Jira 中状态为 Done，但 UPM 中对应需求条目仍显示 In Progress

assertions.name: detects_drift
assertions.description: Should detect the status inconsistency between story and UPM

assertions.name: shows_delta
assertions.description: Should show the delta between story status and UPM status

assertions.name: recommends_action
assertions.description: Should recommend a sync action to resolve the drift

evals.name: new-story-addition
evals.prompt: 添加新故事: US-099 是新创建的故事 (To Do)，将其添加到 UPM requirements 章节

assertions.name: adds_story_to_upm
assertions.description: Should add US-099 as a new entry in UPM requirements

assertions.name: sets_initial_status
assertions.description: Should set the initial status to To Do in UPM

assertions.name: preserves_existing_entries
assertions.description: Should not modify existing UPM entries during addition

evals.name: status-change-propagation
evals.prompt: 状态传播: US-020 从 In Progress 变为 Done，需要同步到 UPM requirements 和相关 Epic 进度

assertions.name: propagates_to_upm
assertions.description: Should propagate Done status to UPM requirements entry

assertions.name: updates_epic_progress
assertions.description: Should update the parent Epic progress percentage

assertions.name: reports_propagation_scope
assertions.description: Should report how many documents were updated

evals.name: conflict-resolution
evals.prompt: 冲突解决: US-030 在 Git commit 中标记为 Done，但 UPM 中为 In Review，Jira 中为 In Progress — 三方冲突

assertions.name: detects_three_way_conflict
assertions.description: Should detect the three-way conflict across sources

assertions.name: shows_all_conflicting_values
assertions.description: Should display all three conflicting status values

assertions.name: proposes_resolution
assertions.description: Should propose a resolution strategy (e.g., latest-wins or manual review)
